title: The Seraphim Turn the Battlefield
description: On pages 18–19, this part focuses on Saturn, Unknown person #16, Kid, Unknown person #17, Vegapunk as CP0 attacks Egghead, Seraphim enter the conflict, Stussy betrays CP0, Kuma moves toward the Red Line, and Vegapunk’s escape plan collapses.
scene: CP0 attacks Egghead, Seraphim enter the conflict, Stussy betrays CP0, Kuma moves toward the Red Line, and Vegapunk’s escape plan collapses.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Did you test for poison in all of them?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #16
dialogue.text: A long time ago... just once.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: The more I see some humanity in you..
